name: Lemon Marinated Sirloin Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 lb To 2 lb sirloin steak, cut into 2 - 2 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions: Score the fat edges of the steak. Place it in a shallow baking dish. Combine the remaining ingredients. Pour over the steak. Cover; let stand for 4 hours in the refrigerator, or overnight, turning the steak several times. Remove the steak from the marinade, reserving the marinade. Pat excess moisture from the steak with paper towels. Grill the steak over medium-hot coals for 17 to 20 minutes. Turn and cook for an additional 15 to 17 minutes for medium-rare. Heat the reserved marinade on the grill. Remove the steak to a serving platter. Carve the steak across the grain; spoon the marinade over slices. Makes 6 servings.
